top_signals.title: Fed Says Basis Trade Key Driver of Hedge Fund Treasury Exposure - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed Says Basis Trade Key Driver of Hedge Fund Treasury Exposure  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
top_signals.summary: While Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory, smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
top_signals.summary: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bowman, A Framework for Practical Monetary Policy Decision Making
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Reykjavík Economic Conference 2026, Central Bank of Iceland, Reykjavík, Iceland

top_signals.title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
top_signals.summary: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.

top_signals.title: FCC votes to toughen rules in bid to better protect undersea cables
top_signals.summary: In an unprecedented move, the FCC also said it plans to mandate that owners and operators of submarine line terminal equipment (SLTE) be licensed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
